title: Forest Fire Spread Simulation
description: An interactive cellular automata-based wildfire simulation with wind-driven propagation, moisture damping, and containment mechanics. Features a 25x40 grid with four cell states (healthy, fire, ash, firebreak), real-time telemetry (unburned canopy, active blazes, carbonized acreage, destruction rate), wind compass control, and interactive terrain painting. Pure vanilla JavaScript — no frameworks.
